subcodes.first_line: O Ocean of forgiveness and pardon, O Sun of clemency, grace and beneficence, come to the aid of Thy suppliant servant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا بحر العفو و الغفران و یا شمس الصفح و اللطف و الاحسان ادرک عبدک المستغیث و
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @prayer for forgiveness, @unity; oneness of humanity, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @assistance to the poor and lowly; the orphan; the sick
